name: devengagelab--engagelab-app-push
description: Call EngageLab App Push REST APIs to send push notifications and in-app messages to Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS devices; manage tags and aliases; create scheduled tasks and push plans; batch push; recall messages; query statistics; and configure callbacks. Use this skill when the user wants to send push notifications via EngageLab, manage device tags/aliases, schedule pushes, use batch single push, group push, message recall, delete users, query push statistics, validate push requests, upload images for OPPO, use push-to-speech, or integrate with EngageLab App Push. Also trigger for "engagelab push", "app push api", "push notification", "registration_id", "tag alias", "scheduled push", "push plan", "batch push", "message recall", "push statistics", "push callback", or "MTPush".
